top_signals.title: US Goods Trade Deficit Widens to Biggest in More Than a Year
top_signals.summary: The US merchandise-trade deficit widened in May to the biggest in more than a year as exports fell and imports rose.

top_signals.title: Microsoft quietly extends free Windows 10 ESU support to October 2027
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has quietly extended its free Windows 10 Extended Security Updates (ESU) program for consumers by an additional year, allowing enrolled devices to continue receiving security updates until October 12, 2027. [...]
